programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige al sur para investigar a un veloz asesino cuya firma coincide con la de un asesino en serie de hace 30 años. Además, el equipo descubre que alguien los sigue e imita los crímenes que ya han resuelto.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando Reid descubre que su novia fue secuestrada por su acosador, él y el equipo de la UAC se reúnen para encontrarla antes de que sea demasiado tarde.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras tanto, Reid encara una pérdida en su vida personal, el resto de la UAC viaja a San Francisco para investigar a las víctimas descubiertas en Mission District.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando el padre de Tony es encontrado dentro de un auto con un cuerpo sin vida en el maletero, el equipo de NCIS debe determinar si es capaz de cometer un asesinato.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando un capitán de la Armada es asesinado en su habitación de hotel, el equipo de NCIS debe localizar y proteger a su compañera embarazada de agresores desconocidos. Mientras tanto, Jimmy trae a su futuro suegro al trabajo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: La investigación por el asesinato de un comandante de la Armada lleva al equipo de NCIS hasta la ubicación de E.J. Barrett.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga el asesinato de un teniente comandante de la Armada mientras lidia con el esposo devastado. Mientras tanto, Ziva reevalúa su futuro cuando regresa Ray.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Consecuencias del pasado
programme.desc: Danny y Baez buscan a una banda de ladrones en una ola de crímenes, y se unen al detective Jimmy Mosley, quien años atrás rompió el corazón de Baez.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Hacia lo inimaginable
programme.desc: El asesino en serie Thomas Wilder desafía a Danny con un mensaje en su última víctima, convirtiendo el juego del gato y el ratón en una venganza personal.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La milla extra
programme.desc: Erin y Anthony emprenden una búsqueda para encontrar a un testigo clave que huyó por miedo a represalias y convencerlo de testificar.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Boomerang
programme.desc: Estalla la indignación pública cuando no se procesa a un policía que disparó a un adolescente, afectando a Frank, el alcalde y la oficina de Erin. Danny busca al autor de un posterior tiroteo contra un oficial, posible caso de venganza.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras tanto, Reid encara una pérdida en su vida personal, el resto de la UAC viaja a San Francisco para investigar a las víctimas descubiertas en Mission District.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando las hijas de Bruce Morrison, una escritor cuya esposa desapareció misteriosamente el año pasado, desaparecen en el aniversario de la desaparición de su madre, el BAU debe estudiar a Morrison como un posible sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige a Austin para investigar a las víctimas encontradas allí con sus relojes a la hora equivocada, una pista que puede conectar los delitos.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A runaway biker makes multiple clumsy attempts to slip away from deputies. A shady figure has a curious method of trying to get a drink of water. A young woman starts making unwise choices when her family leaves town.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man in possession of a stolen car explains his unique nickname to deputies. Police go to the same house twice in under 30 minutes to sort out a messy marital spat. A mom with multiple priors is caught in a bind.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy tries to level with a man who’s struggled with addiction for a decade. Security guards at an aquarium warn officers about a man with a gun. A masked-up cyclist has no luck out-pedaling the officer on his tail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After leading police on a slow pursuit, a sharply-dressed driver has a heated talk with another deputy. In spite of her tears, police unravel a woman’s lies one-by-one. A traditionally bad omen turns into good luck for a couple.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop turns dangerous when a driver takes off with a deputy halfway inside the vehicle. Recent changes in the law and a forthright attitude help a man avoid jail time. A neighborhood man gives motorists a scare.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A biker with a history of stealing vehicles doesn’t know how to drive his motorcycle. A man in- between jobs takes up a sketchy method of earning money. Deputies strongly question the legitimacy of a man’s work van.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A business owner flags down officers when an erratic man starts climbing on his car. Unusual circumstances allow officers to cut a driver some slack for being honest. A man forgets to return a car after running errands.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect on the run makes a dangerous decision when he finds himself cornered. An unsuspecting driver gets more than she bargained for when she gives an old friend a lift. A friendly woman has a thing for cowboys.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A teenager who ran away from home tries running from the cops too. A man set a date to turn his life around, but deputies ask him to start earlier. A man found with hundreds of sunglasses claims he was going to give them away.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police deploy spike strips to put an end to a dangerous stolen vehicle pursuit. An alleged mechanic says he has permission to drive a semi-truck — the owner says otherwise. A couple stops a woman from driving away in their car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: When the cuffs come out, an emotional cyclist gives deputies the runaround. A boyfriend’s honesty saves his girlfriend from going to jail on her birthday. Police investigate a case of road rage involving a possible gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A runaway cyclist dips into a house to catch his breath. A deputy tries to cut a man some slack despite his mistakes. The owners of an empty house call the police when they hear someone else inside.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A pair of suspects on the run pretend they were busy napping. A man reaches for something in his pocket, but denies knowing what it is. A family calls the police after their roommate brandishes a gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy tries to cut a guy some slack after his relationship troubles got out of hand. A teenager gets a serious lesson in not drinking while underage. A couple is forced to take a raincheck on their wedding day.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: During a traffic stop, a driver drops off his passenger before speeding away. Deputies are amazed when a man offers them an ID that looks nothing like him. Deputies investigate a case of road rage involving a gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man with multiple felony warrants gets one last taste of freedom before heading to prison. A speeding driver is arrested for the same thing he was arrested for the day before. A runaway suspect leaves a trail behind him.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A very cooperative car thief tells deputies all about his good fortune. An argument over business leaves one man on the ground with a bloody mouth. The occupants of a truck are oblivious to what deputies find in the backseat.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist allegedly mistakes a deputy for a thief and tries to escape into the bushes. Police cut a dad some slack by not towing the family car. Two sisters catch the police’s attention when they take their spat to the road.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An elderly driver sacrifices his own van during his desperate escape attempt. A traffic stop on a suspended driver turns up more than anticipated. Several car occupants learn it’s better to tell the truth from the start.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies gradually get to the bottom of a possible stolen vehicle. A woman asks the police to help her make a clean break from bad habits. A single woman tries to plan a date with an online suitor, but the night quickly goes awry.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A family gets a huge scare when a fleeing suspect finds his way into their house. Police sort out a chaotic argument between two childhood friends. A woman in a suspicious vehicle plays fast and loose with the truth.

programme.title: COPS

programme.desc: Cuando Kate cumple 30 años, sus amigas Evie y Charlie se ofrecen a hacer una fiesta, pero la fiesta se sale de control.

programme.title: Como si fuera cierto
programme.desc: David Abbott, un arquitecto solitario, encuentra un increíble apartamento en San Francisco, solo para descubrir que está embrujado por el espíritu del inquilino anterior, Elizabeth Masterson, una doctora superdotada que está en coma.

programme.title: Cosas te tíos
programme.desc: Jason Lee interpreta a un ejecutivo en la ciudad de Seattle que se va a casar con la hija de su jefe (Selma Blair). Su vida se convierte en una pesadilla cuando no se acuerda si la engañó durante su despedida de soltero.

programme.title: Chabelo y Pepito detectives

programme.title: Ahí viene Martín Corona
programme.desc: Martín Corona (Pedro Infante) y "Piporro" son campeones de los pobres, los desafortunados, y las mujeres, pero Carmen Linares y Rosario Medina no caen por su carisma.

programme.title: El escritor fantasma
programme.desc: El cineasta Roman Polanski eleva la tensión en este thriller sobre un escritor (Ewan McGregor) encargado de redactar las vivencias de un ex primer ministro (Pierce Brosnan).

programme.title: Destrucción
programme.desc: Una detective de policía reconecta con gente relacionada con una misión encubierta de hace años para encontrar paz.

programme.title: Kalifornia
programme.desc: Una pareja decide ir a conocer los lugares donde se cometieron los crímenes de un libro de asesinos en serie, pero ni se imaginan que no tienen que ir muy lejos para conocer a unos brutales criminales.

programme.title: Sueños de un asesino
programme.desc: La vida pacífica de la familia de Claire Cooper (Annette Bening) sufre un cambio terrorífico cuando un asesino serial (Robert Downey Jr.) invade su pueblo de Nueva Inglaterra... y acosa sus sueños con pistas de sus próximos movimientos mortales.

programme.title: Crepúsculo
programme.desc: Le leyenda del cine, Paul Newman encabeza un electo luminoso en esta aclamada intriga llena de estrellas y suspenso.

programme.title: Find Me Guilty
programme.desc: Basada en la historia del gángster Jackie DiNorscio (Vin Diesel, 'Furious 7'), quien se representó a sí mismo en el juicio penal más largo de la historia de Estados Unidos. Con Peter Dinklage.

programme.title: Sin lugar para los débiles
programme.desc: Los cineastas Joel y Ethan Coen (FARGO), ganadores de cuatro premios de la Academia, incluyendo mejor película, regresan con un éxito apasionante en el que el irresistible botín robado de la escena del crimen desata una violencia imparable.

programme.title: Lluvia de fuego
programme.desc: Cuando una explosión sacude a Boston, el experto en escuadrones de bombas Jimmy Dove (Jeff Bridges) se ve inmerso en el trabajo más desgarrador de su carrera.

programme.title: Ceguera
programme.desc: Liderados por un elenco de estrellas como Mark Ruffalo y Julianne Moore, las víctimas de una misteriosa epidemia de ceguera que se extiende por una ciudad pronto se enfrentan a una aflicción aún mayor, la caótica ruptura del orden social.

programme.title: Aventura en Alaska
programme.desc: Tras graduarse de la Universidad Emory en 1992, el estudiante estrella y atleta Christopher McCandless abandonó sus posesiones, entregó sus ahorros de $24.000 a la caridad y se fue a dedo hasta Alaska a vivir en la naturaleza.

programme.title: El espectáculo más grande del mundo
programme.desc: Charlton Heston interpreta a Brad Braden, un director de circo que vive para mantener su espectáculo. Cuando el "Big Top" está por tocar fondo, Braden contrata al Gran Sebastian, un osado trapecista, para revitalizar el circo.

programme.title: El pacificador
programme.desc: Cuando un tren que transporta ojivas nucleares se estrella en la Unión Soviética, la especialista nuclear Dra. Kelly descubre que el accidente es en realidad parte de un complot para cubrir el robo de las armas.

programme.title: Peligro inminente
programme.desc: Cuando su mentor, el almirante James Greer, se enferma, Ryan es nombrado director en funciones de la CIA.

programme.title: Actos de venganza
programme.desc: Un abogado de hablar rápido (Antonio Banderas) transforma su cuerpo y toma un voto de silencio, que no se romperá hasta que descubra quién mató a su esposa e hija y tenga su venganza.

programme.title: Venganza
programme.desc: Durante su permiso de libertad provisional, un convicto logra escapar de los guardias y planea su venganza contra aquellos que lo convirtieron en un asesino a sangre fría.

programme.title: Actos de violencia
programme.desc: Cuando su prometida es secuestrada por traficantes de personas, Roman y sus hermanos ex-militares se proponen localizarla y salvarla antes de que sea demasiado tarde.

programme.title: Los siete sellos del apocalipsis
programme.desc: En esta película épica de desastres y fe, una madre y un padre buscan desesperadamente a su único hijo, mientras que un asteroide gigante que se dirige a la Tierra desencadena una serie de eventos apocalípticos.

programme.title: Juego de ladrones
programme.desc: Un ladrón veterano (Morgan Freeman) contrata a uno más joven (Antonio Banderas) para ayudarle a hacer un último trabajo para saldar una deuda con la mafia rusa.

programme.title: Sahara
programme.desc: Dos aventureros ávidos de emociones se cruzan con una hermosa doctora y van en busca del mayor tesoro, que se cobra las vidas de todos los que lo buscan.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: Cuando Tripp descubre a una criatura llamada Creech que consume mucha gasolina, un dúo poco probable se une para una aventura divertida, graciosa y sincera, en un Monster Truck súper poderoso para reunir a Creech con su familia.

programme.title: Garras
programme.desc: Michael Douglas y Val Kilmer protagonizan esta gran aventura ambientada en el África Oriental de 1896. Dos leones asesinos interrumpen la construcción del ferrocarril. Cazan juntos, sin mostrar temor por el hombre o las armas de fuego.

programme.title: Sahara
programme.desc: Dos aventureros ávidos de emociones se cruzan con una hermosa doctora y van en busca del mayor tesoro, que se cobra las vidas de todos los que lo buscan.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: Cuando Tripp descubre a una criatura llamada Creech que consume mucha gasolina, un dúo poco probable se une para una aventura divertida, graciosa y sincera, en un Monster Truck súper poderoso para reunir a Creech con su familia.

programme.title: Naturaleza desatada: terremoto
programme.desc: La familia de un ingeniero está en el camino directo del peligro después de que un temblor masivo dañe gravemente una planta nuclear rusa.

programme.title: Inmersión letal
programme.desc: Paul Walker y Jessica Alba esperan pasar unos momentos inolvidables buceando, pero se meten en un lío con un traficante cuando encuentran la carga ilícita de un avión hundido en este thriller submarino lleno de acción y sorpresas.

programme.title: La Pantera Rosa 2
programme.desc: Steve Martin vuelve a divertirnos encarnando al torpe Inspector Jacques Clouseau. Esta vez debe descubrir quién ha robado la Pantera Rosa, un diamante de valor inestimable, y otros tesoros del mundo. Coprotagonizada por Jean Reno y John Cleese.

programme.title: Una guerra de película
programme.desc: Ben Stiller, Jack Black y Robert Downey Jr. encabezan un reparto singular en 'Una Guerra de Película', una comedia de acción sobre un grupo de actores que se disponen a realizar la película de guerra más cara.

programme.title: Escuela de rock
programme.desc: Jack Black interpreta a un guitarrista con delirios de grandeza. Cuando lo echan de la banda, y se pone a buscar trabajo, se convierte en un maestro suplente y hace de su clase una banda de rock and roll.

programme.title: La Pantera Rosa
programme.desc: El torpe Inspector Clouseau (Steve Martin) se encarga de investigar el asesinato de un famoso entrenador de fútbol y el robo del diamante Pantera Rosa, de inestimable valor. Él y su compañero Gilbert Ponton (Jean Reno) van de calamidad en calamidad.

programme.title: La Pantera Rosa 2
programme.desc: Steve Martin vuelve a divertirnos encarnando al torpe Inspector Jacques Clouseau. Esta vez debe descubrir quién ha robado la Pantera Rosa, un diamante de valor inestimable, y otros tesoros del mundo. Coprotagonizada por Jean Reno y John Cleese.

programme.title: Una guerra de película
programme.desc: Ben Stiller, Jack Black y Robert Downey Jr. encabezan un reparto singular en 'Una Guerra de Película', una comedia de acción sobre un grupo de actores que se disponen a realizar la película de guerra más cara.

programme.title: The 51st State (LAS)
programme.desc: Un químico maestro estadounidense planea obtener un gran puntaje en un negocio de drogas único en la vida. No todo va según lo planeado y pronto se enreda en una red de engaños.

programme.title: El robo del siglo
programme.desc: Basada en hechos reales, un grupo de ladrones realizó el que se considera uno de los robos bancarios más famosos e inteligentes de la historia de Argentina al robar la sucursal del Banco Río en Acassuso.

programme.title: Purasangre
programme.desc: Purasangre narra la historia de cómo un equipo de cinco profesionales se ve obligado a robar un famoso hipódromo y casino.

programme.title: Instructions Not Included
programme.desc: Valentin (Eugenio Derbez) is Acapulco’s resident playboy until his life gets turned upside down when a former fling leaves a baby girl on his doorstep.

programme.title: Ladron Que Roba a Ladron (LAS)
programme.desc: Un par de ladrones profesionales hallan complicado su plan para robar a un millonario después de que los miembros hábiles del equipo regular rechazan el plan. Los ladrones se verán forzados a contratar a novatos para completar el trabajo.

programme.title: Ladrones
programme.desc: Fernando Colunga y Eduardo Yáñez lideran las risas como los Robin Hoods modernos en esta tremendamente entretenida secuela del gran éxito "Ladrón que roba a ladrón".

programme.title: The Guest (LAS)
programme.desc: The expected return of the son for his father funeral shakes up a traditional and secretive familiar environment where women are supposed to count on men to survive as he shows himself turned into a female.

programme.title: Navidad Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Con solo dos días antes de Navidad, Angelina se embarca en una misión casi imposible para tratar de salvar a su malcriada hija de 14 años, de ir por el camino equivocado. ¿Podrá Angelina sacar a su hija de la lista de los traviesos?

programme.title: Navidad en cuatro patas
programme.desc: Maggie y Jack, dos personas solteras, tratan de regalar un perro a sus hijos de Navidad. Su lucha por la custodia de un mismo animal, les lleva a hacer algo que nunca hubieran esperado: enamorarse.

programme.title: Los 12 perros de Navidad
programme.desc: Un padre viudo y desempleado envía a regañadientes a su hija a permanecer con su tía en una ciudad que ha prohibido los perros. En el camino a la escuela un día encuentra un perrito y decide quedárselo.

programme.title: El perro que salvó la navidad de vacaciones
programme.desc: Un astuto can y un caniche francés deben salvar su hogar de unos tontos ladrones que atacan durante las vacaciones de Navidad.

programme.title: Jesús, el niño Dios
programme.desc: En Belén nace Jesús, el salvador enviado por Dios, pero el rey Herodes dispone que mueran todos los menores de tres años. Un ángel avisa a José para que se refugie con su familia en Egipto y un legionario conduce a la familia por el desierto.

programme.title: Cupido navideño
programme.desc: Dos asistentes ejecutivos que trabajan duro hacen arreglos para que sus jefes se enamoren durante las vacaciones.

programme.title: Una Niñera Para Navidad
programme.desc: Una mujer de carrera cuida a los hijos de un ejecutivo de publicidad de Beverly Hills durante las vacaciones navideñas.

programme.title: Una Navidad real
programme.desc: Un ejecutivo de publicidad trabajador se enamora de un consultor que es un príncipe disfrazado.

programme.title: Chucky el muñeco diabólico
programme.desc: El joven Andy es el único que sabe que su muñeco, Chucky, está poseído por el alma de un asesino y que ha cometido varios crímenes macabros. Pero el verdadero terror empieza cuando Chucky decide transferir su espíritu maligno a un humano... Andy.

programme.title: Stigmata
programme.desc: Una joven manifiesta estigmas como los que Jesucristo sufrió en su cricifixión. Ni médicos ni psiquiatras pueden darle ninguna explicación, sólo un sacerdote enviado por el Vaticano la ayudará, aunque tenga que ir en contra de algunas de sus creencias.

programme.title: El último exorcismo: Parte II
programme.desc: Nell está de nuevo en la seguridad de la civilización y es enviada a vivir en una casa de acogida, donde se la anima a dejar atrás su pasado e iniciar una nueva vida.

programme.title: Chucky el muñeco diabólico
programme.desc: El joven Andy es el único que sabe que su muñeco, Chucky, está poseído por el alma de un asesino y que ha cometido varios crímenes macabros. Pero el verdadero terror empieza cuando Chucky decide transferir su espíritu maligno a un humano... Andy.

programme.title: Stigmata
programme.desc: Una joven manifiesta estigmas como los que Jesucristo sufrió en su cricifixión. Ni médicos ni psiquiatras pueden darle ninguna explicación, sólo un sacerdote enviado por el Vaticano la ayudará, aunque tenga que ir en contra de algunas de sus creencias.

programme.title: Terrifier (LAS)
programme.desc: Art el payaso regresa y pone su mirada en tres mujeres jóvenes, junto con cualquiera que se meta en su camino.

programme.title: The Ninth Gate (LAS)
programme.desc: Roman Polanski dirige y Johnny Depp protagoniza este thriller sobrenatural sobre un vendedor de libros raros que descubre un manuscrito demoníaco.

programme.title: The Halliday Brand
programme.desc: A western about a young man's (Joseph Cotten) disillusionment with his father (Ward Bond), a corrupt sheriff. When his dad turns away from the lynching of his sister's lover, the boy rebels and his father declares him an 'outlaw.'

programme.title: Hondo
programme.desc: John Wayne plays Hondo Lane, a cavalry rider who becomes the protector of Angie Lowe as well as a father figure to her boy, Johnny. Angie, determinedly awaiting the return of her husband, refuses to leave their homestead despite the growing danger.

programme.title: Big Jake
programme.desc: An aging Texas cattle man who has outlived his time swings into action when outlaws kidnap his grandson and wound his son.

programme.title: McLintock!
programme.desc: The cattle rancher McLintock (John Wayne) puts his brand on the territory and every woman in it! Louise Warren plays a widow who moves with her two children onto McLintock’s ranch to serve as cook, while Maureen O’Hara plays the estranged wife.

programme.title: Along Came Jones
programme.desc: Gary Cooper gives a marvelous, tongue-in-cheek performance as a fumble-fingered cowpoke who is mistaken for a notorious bandit and almost gets killed by both sides of the law...all while managing to capture the attention of Loretta Young.

programme.title: King of the Cowboys
programme.desc: Saboteurs are blowing up government warehouses (during World War II). Roy and his pals work undercover to put an end to their operations.

programme.title: Cowboy and the Senorita
programme.desc: A worthless gold mine might in fact have hidden gold deposits. Leave it to Roy to find out the truth!

programme.title: Comes a Horseman
programme.desc: Set in the American West of the 1940s, a pair of little-guy ranchers join forces against the depredations of a ruthless land baron determined to expand his empire at whatever cost. Starring Jane Fonda, James Caan, and Jason Robards.

programme.title: Flying Tigers
programme.desc: John Wayne adds luster to this early WWII film about the famous P-40 Flying Group who soared into battle against the Japanese in defense of China's freedom, Great dogfight scenes!

programme.title: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: Producer-director Otto Preminger’s epic treatment of the bombing of Pearl Harbor details the devastating attack on the Hawaiian naval base as well as the explosive, behind-the-scenes stories.

programme.title: Strategic Air Command
programme.desc: Aviation and sports come together as a baseball player is recalled to Air Force duty.

programme.title: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: A stellar cast, including Michael Caine, Laurence Olivier and Christopher Plummer highlights this epic telling of the greatest air battle in history, when the outnumbered Royal Air Force defeated the German Luftwaffe, saving England from invasion.

programme.title: Houdini
programme.desc: Tony Curtis gives a winning performance as the great Houdini, the struggling circus performer who emerged as the world’s most captivating magician and escape artist.

programme.title: Detective Story
programme.desc: Kirk Douglas stars as the rigid detective whose personal code has become twisted from dealing with too many criminals. Eleanor Parker is his wife, tormented by a guilty secret.

programme.title: Hobson's Choice
programme.desc: Widower Henry Hobson is a successful bootmaker and a tyrannical father of three daughters who all want to leave him by getting married, but he refuses because marriage traditions require him to pay out settlements.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: When the supply Sgt is reluctant to go on vacation, Sgt Carter bets him any Knucklehead can take over his job. Of course, what bigger Knucklehead than Pyle to prove him right.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: In the first of the 3 part sea maneuvers, Gomer sneaks a cat aboard a Navy ship, unaware there is sensitive Petty Chief Officer who throws all Contraband overboard.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Part 2 of sea maneuvers has Pyle repeatedly goofing up Carter's mission.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Part 3 of Sea Maneuvers, has Carter challenging the Petty Chief Officer to a boxing match not knowing the Chief was the Fleet Champ with 37 knockouts.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: It's a hair-raising episode as Eb (Tom Lester) enrolls in a correspondence course to become a barber. Lisa (Eva Gabor) and Oliver (Eddie Albert) give him the money to learn the trade but learning how to cut hair by mail has its glitches.

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.desc: Un guardia de seguridad desapareció de su puesto sin dejar rastro. Sus restos fueron encontrados un año después en un campamento lejano.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Fantasma en la máquina
programme.desc: Se investiga la aparente sobredosis y suicidio de la esposa del reverendo Bill Guthrie, Sharon, y los detectives recuperan archivos incriminatorios de la computadora de Bill y se enteran de su infidelidad.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una joven mujer asiste a los servicios religiosos de la tarde y luego desaparece. Cuando se encuentra su automóvil abandonado, el tanque está vacío y falta una lata de gasolina que tenía en su baúl para emergencias.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Nicole Rae Walker, de 6 años de edad, murió en un choque donde el culpable se dio a la fuga en su Vecindario de Ft. Lauderdale.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los doctores no saben por qué un científico joven se ha enfermado muy gravemente. Cuando las pruebas revelan finalmente la causa, es muy tarde para salvarlo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Muere un atleta de secundaria, luego de que lo atropellaran y se dieran a la fuga. Todos en el pueblo lamentaron su muerte. Encontrar al asesino era muy poco probable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El Negocio de Metales
programme.desc: Los médicos no pueden identificar el origen de la enfermedad de un empresario.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1990, el cuerpo de Shirley Andronowich fue encontrado mutilado. Los testigos le dijeron a la policía que tuvo una pelea con su esposo la noche anterior, pero la evidencia forense demostró que él no tuvo nada que ver con su muerte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Jardín del mal
programme.desc: Cuando un popular disc jockey fue encontrado asesinado en un jardín comunitario, la policía entró en acción.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Trampa para turistas
programme.desc: En 1993, el estado de Florida era conocido por algo más que Disney World. La atención mundial se centró en una serie de robos dirigidos a turistas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando la casa de un policía se incendia, los expertos sospechan de un incendio provocado. El oficial cuya casa fue incendiada arresta al narcotraficante de bajo nivel James Wren, quien confiesa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Mientras estaba practicando tiros en un hermoso día de primavera, Martin Dillon es asesinado con disparos. Su amigo sostiene que fue un extraño accidente, pero se necesitan más de 20 años para que la verdad salga a la luz.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los médicos quedan desconcertados cuando un niño de dos años es trasladado urgentemente al hospital con convulsiones cerebrales y dificultades para respirar.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2001, Ginger Hayes y su pequeño hijo fueron secuestrados durante un robo de auto. El crimen había sido reportado por un testigo a los pocos minutos de ocurrir.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Emboscada en la escuela dominical
programme.desc: Cuando un hombre es asesinado a tiros en su propio garaje, la policía descubre que una herida sufrida por la afligida viuda puede haber sido autoinfligida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: A cenar y ver una película
programme.desc: La hora de la muerte se vuelve fundamental después de que se encuentra asesinada a una mujer embarazada en su habitación con aire acondicionado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Falso testimonio
programme.desc: La muerte de una mujer en Pensilvania desencadena una investigación por homicidio sobre la muerte de otra mujer en Carolina del Norte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En este episodio clásico de Archivos Forenses la serie de crímenes reales más extensa de la historia de la televisión, Eileen y Derrick Severs desaparecen de su casa en un pequeño pueblo de Gran Bretaña y la policía encuentra evidencia de un crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: A Prueba de Fuego
programme.desc: Un pirómano en serie inicia varios incendios que causan daños por un valor de millones de dólares y la muerte de tres personas. Él es descubierto, en parte, mediante el uso de hipnosis forense.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Entre 1985 y 1988, 18 personas fueron asfixiadas, abusadas sexualmente y dadas por muertas en las remotas montañas de California.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando un miembro adinerado de la sociedad muere después de caer de las escaleras, los testimonios de los testigos contradicen la evidencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima había ingerido una gran cantidad de cianuro. Una pista muy improbable: una falla en el sobre de correo, expuso a un asesino que estaba dispuesto a matar a gente inocente.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Veterans fight for their jobs as new girls try to live their dreams and make DCC Training Camp. Standing in their way is; panel Interviews, solos, an exhausting dance combination and a room full of very tough judges.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The new candidates' eyes are opened as they get a taste of what it is to be a DCC. As girls struggle to learn the dances, the reality of being "Big Time", sets in. Melissa Rycroft meets the new girls for the first time.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With the first cut looming, the girls must push their dance skills to the limit. Melissa Rycroft works to bring out showmanship. Extra stress is added on Makeover day as the girls try to get the DCC look.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: A new choreographer shakes things up. The girls better start looking good because uniform fittings and the Belk fashion show are on the agenda. Surprises continue when two-time Grammy winner Kacey Musgraves, stops by rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Melissa Rycroft makes a house call to help Yuko. Kitty Carter rocks a few of the candidate's worlds. Cameos give Kelli & Judy a fresh perspective on the girls. At Show Group auditions, the girls let it all hang out.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kellie Pickler comes to a rehearsal to share her experience and motivate the girls as Training Camp is coming to an end. Melissa Rycroft makes Kelsey aware of a big mistake. Candace Romo helps with a big night of cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Squad announcement is bittersweet as some favorites go home. The team has their first appearance at the Star Ribbon cutting. Game Day is when dreams come true!

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of beautiful and talented women converge on AT&T Stadium to start the hardest audition process in professional sports, trying out for a coveted spot on the most famous NFL cheerleading squad in the world, the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With the field narrowed down to 119 women, the pressure is on. They must quickly learn a power pom routine and the famous kickline in order to perform it an hour later before the judges.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The veterans finally enter the audition process. Now all 83 women are judged head to head during a panel interview, a solo dance performance and on their appearance on the football field as seen and the big screen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: 44 women begin the very first training camp at the new 1 billion dollar Cowboys' facility, The Star. At the First Meeting, Kelli lays down the law and makes it clear that eight women will be sent home this summer.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: First, the ladies need to have the "classic look" of a Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader. Kelli's hair and make-up transformations are legendary. The ladies are also assessed through a new state of the art fitness test, "Styku".

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli media trains the rookie candidates to determine who best represents the DCC at press events. NBC news anchor, Meredith Land tests their on-camera interview skills.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Personality is critical when representing the DCC brand. Kelli takes the women on location to see how they interact during a public appearance.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Katy Perry's choreographer, Nick Florez, stops by to offer some performance advice to the ladies. A day that each cheerleader never forgets. The first time they wear the DCC uniform to pose for their cameo photos.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After proving he’s still got talent on the hardwood, Jimmy is invited to try out for the Wheelchair Basketball Association’s Junior Team. It’s Jimmy’s second chance at athletic stardom, and an opportunity to make his father proud.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As Liberty’s pregnancy enters its sixth month, she and JT are forced to face reality: even though no longer a couple, they have to deal with the pregnancy.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Desperate for cash, JT has stolen drugs from the pharmacy… He becomes entangled in a web between his boss, the drug dealer, and the police.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Someone’s definitely interested in Marco. But as it turns out, Tim is interested in Marco, but not for the expected reason. Tim knows Marco is gay, and has been struggling with how to come out to his friends and family.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The one-year anniversary of the school shooting is approaching and everyone’s feeling the weight of it. Not least of whom is Spinner Mason, still persona non grata.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tonight is the premiere of “Jay and Silent Bob Go Canadian, Eh” and with many of the students and faculty on the guest list, it’s like the whole school is gripped in movie premiere fever!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige wakes Alex up in her bed – Paige spent the night on the floor – and as the two girls awkwardly prepare for school, they try to avoid the elephant in the room. As in, that they KISSED last night. What happened?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig bursts into rehearsal with the good news – they’ve been accepted to perform at a Northern Sounds Showcase. The band is NOT so into it at first – music is Craig’s dream, not theirs.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Since being "saved" everything has been going Spinner's way: he's made a good friend in Friendship Club leader Linus; his relationship with Darcy has been going strong, and his recent interest in improving school life has been getting him noticed.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Simpson-Nelson household is in chaos. With Snake gone and Spike totally down in the dumps, keeping the household together has fallen totally onto Emma’s shoulders.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma is finally getting some control over her life. Snake and Spike are back together, she’s been running every day, and she’s barely eating.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Facing the pressure of year-end exams, the furthest thing from Marco’s mind is what happened a year ago – when Dylan stomped all over his heart. Marco takes this as a sign that he’s over Dylan for good.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The end of another school year finds Darcy’s faith – in her boyfriend – being put to the test. When she discovers that Spinner has a past, Darcy grapples with a harsh reality of teen romance: jealousy.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Peter receives a new car for his birthday, he quickly becomes a frequent face in the street racing scene.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things heat up between Emma and Sean – and when she takes time off from Peter to consider her relationship with Sean, Peter takes action – and Sean winds up expelled from Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma is happy that the racing debacle is behind them, and that Peter is finally free if you don’t count the house arrest and five hundred hours of community service.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jimmy starts the year off with big plans, coaching the girl’s junior basketball team and he is determined to take his relationship with Ashley to the next level. But can Jimmy handle the realities of his sexual future?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Peter, hoping to join the Spirit Squad, links Darcy’s personal web page to his. Darcy is thrilled with all the attention and hits she gets, and even posts some racy pictures of the Spirit Squad.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Darcy’s online admirers take up more and more of her time, and her relationship with Spinner suffers. As Darcy posts increasingly sexy photos of herself, she’s surprised when her favourite online fan decides to introduce himself.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Career Aptitude test results come in, Spinner is less than pleased with his results, and in desperation, convinces Jimmy to go into business selling T-shirts adorned with Jimmy’s illustrations.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After being released from jail, Sean finds himself sleeping on Spike & Snake’s couch. Sean is focusing on putting the last few months behind him, getting a great job and being a fantastic boyfriend to Emma.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig’s back in town for a music festival – and Manny can’t help picking up right where they left off.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ellie thinks all Craig’s bad behaviour is due to Manny – to help him, she’s determined to stay by his side while he’s in town.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s intent on getting over Craig, and uses Liberty’s upcoming birthday as an excuse to throw a party at Emma’s house while Spike and Snake are out of town.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In shock after over JT’s death, Toby turns to Liberty, convinced that his somber funeral isn’t what JT would’ve wanted. Liberty agrees, and the two grief-stricken friends plan to throw a celebratory memorial for JT at Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s parents want her to come home after the tragedy at Emma’s house – and to Emma’s surprise, Manny agrees.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a spectacular panic attack during a midterm exam, Paige’s professor at Banting offers her one more chance – which comes in the form of a ton of work to be completed over the holiday weekend.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Dr Iain Stewart looks at how salt has played a crucial role in the history of the Mediterranean, from the ice ages to the preservation of food and dead bodies in ancient Egypt.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Body in the Bog
programme.desc: Veteran archaeologist Ned Kelly and a team of scientists investigate the find of a mummified body in the boglands of Cashel, Ireland.

programme.title: Ancient Voices
programme.desc: A dig hopes to excavate the 2000-year-old tomb of Qin Shihuang, China's First Emperor.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David travels the world to unravel some of the wonders and puzzles of palaeontology. But how do you find the world's oldest and rarest reptile?

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: Could pterodactyls fly? And why did trilobites have such good eyes? David Attenborough investigates the secret lives of animals from the past, as told in the fossil record.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers dinosaur bones in the Sahara desert and visits the biggest, most spectacular dinosaur displays in the world.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers bizarre creatures of the earliest seas, tiny horses the size of spaniels and an animal that's half bird and half reptile - the rarest of them all.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The evolution of the predators who lived 550 million years ago, and how the first amphibians migrated from sea to land.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Three hundred million years ago, the forests were ruled by insects. This was a world in which giant dragonflies battled with two-foot-wide spiders.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: On the supercontinent Pangea, early therapsids, creatures more similar to mammals than reptiles, fight for survival alongside other animals. In the carboniferous swamps, insects and arthropods take over and grow into giants.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: This episode explains how the 120-million-year reign of the dinosaurs ended when mammals became the fastest and fiercest creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: A look at the science that has proved Darwin's idea that intelligent, sophisticated humans have an ancestral connection with the ape.

programme.title: Ancient Powers

programme.title: Ancient Powers

programme.title: Ancient Powers

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In a world where enemies watch for weakness, the ancient powers must use all their strength and cunning to defend their people, conquer new lands, and rise to the challenge of the battlefield.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In an unruly world, the ancient powers must lead their people, create ways to govern and keep rebellion at bay. To achieve this, they may invent caste systems, organise gladiatorial games or turn to gods.

programme.desc: Cesar works to dial down the bad behaviors of four problem dogs who won sessions at the PETCO auditions.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The cameras are turned around, as we get a tour of life "behind the scenes" on Dog the Bounty Hunter. Using interviews with Dog and the posse, the TV crew, and never before seen footage, this is one of most revealing and heartfelt episodes of the series.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive spells trouble for Dog in today's hunt. When the leads grow cold, it's the US Postal Service to the rescue as a mail carrier lends a helping hand. Dog's team surrounds the suspected safe house and silently awaits their prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's case involves a Samoan, so Dog knows that the runner's close-knit kinfolk holds the keys to bringing him in. Dog's plan is to convince the family that everyone is best served if the fugitive mans up and takes care of business.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target for today was once an upstanding member of his community. Now with no home, no job, and the law on his trail, this middle-aged exile from middle-class society is using the cold end of an ice pipe to soothe his troubled soul.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: New series focusing on the tumultuous home and professional life of bounty hunter Dwayne "Dog" Chapman, and his partner and wife Beth. In the first episode, Dog and team chase Floyd Chapman (no relation), a heavily tattooed bail jumper.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In Hawaii, Dog sets off from Honolulu to Kona to help his son Leland with some of his fugitives. First, a stop at Leland's boxing gym to warm up for their day of hunting with a quick sparring session and some father-and-son time together.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to liven things up with a competition. He and Beth will hunt for one fugitive, while Leland and Justin chase another. The winner will be the duo that captures its fugitive first. Will Dog keep bragging rights as the Best Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Once a criminal himself, Dog knows how it feels to be hunted. In this episode, Dog and the team delve into the depths of Honolulu's Chinatown as they search for a young Samoan girl who's gone down the wrong path. After a frustrating day of hunting, D

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: While hunting an elusive deep sea fisherman, Dog is also trying to plan a great Mother's Day for Beth, but he's having problems finding the special flowers Beth wants.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is hunting a man known as The Godfather of Waikiki. Dog and Beth bailed him out as a courtesy, but now he is refusing to go to court. If Dog doesn't bring him in, it could cost him more than money; he may lose his respect on the street.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has a big problem. Patty Estabilio has jumped a $15,000 bail bond and disappeared into Hawaii's underworld. Kissing the kids good night, Dog and Beth, with Tim and Leland at their side, plunge into a drug-infused netherworld.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Justin is the low man on the totem pole in the Chapman clan, and this means that the rest of the team is always teasing him. But Justin wants to be a full-fledged member of the team, and Dog has a fugitive that will be his test case.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team return to their roots, with a visit to their home town of Denver. Dog and Tim begin the day with an early morning radio show appearance, and it pays off when a listener calls in with a tip about one of the fugitives they're hunting.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Back in Denver Dog discovers that recapturing the past can be more difficult then tracking down felons. On a day of more misses then hits in their fugitive hunting, Dog and Beth repeatedly collide with reminders of their early days.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog hunts down Chris, a fugitive wanted on drug charges. Dog turns over every rock, but to no avail. Later, they decides to revoke the bonds they holds on Chris's mother and stepfather because they've violated the conditions of their own bonds.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after Virginia, a hard-to-find lawbreaker. He gets a tip that a pickup truck will be going to Virginia's house. In true private-eye fashion, the team tails the truck in two SUVs, regularly switching the follow car to throw off their scent.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to sweep the island clean of as many fugitives as he can in two days. Raymond, wanted on drug charges, is an easy grab. Mauro, wanted for solicitation, is busted. And a Samoan, Siamau, is convinced to fly back to Hawaii from L.A.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after a fugitive named Tracy who lives in a homeless shelter, but the shelter's staff is uncooperative, and the two sides get into an angry confrontation that forces Dog to temporarily back off.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog juggles his job and family responsibilities at the same time. He leads the search for Robert, a low-level drug dealer. As he hunts down Robert, Dog gets on the phone to tell Beth not to spend too much money to furnish Leland's Honolulu apartment.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Upset because one his puppies may die and wanting to give the little guy a second chance in life, Dog decides to offer one of the fugitives a second chance, too. He captures Paul, a meth addict, then steers him to a rehab program instead of jail.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team are out to revoke bail on Eugene, a chronic heroin addict. They find him in a squalid apartment with a huge stockpile of syringes, and they can see that his physical condition is deteriorating.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team fight the war on ice-crystal methamphetamine-on many fronts. They appear on a special anti-drug float in a parade. Then they go after bail-jumping Pana, a convicted drug dealer.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Hunting down a fugitive known as "Bozo," Dog gets help from an unexpected source, Bozo's father-in-law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team get a big surprise after they track down Bosco, a fugitive who they believe is addicted to methamphetamines. They discover he's off drugs, settling into a normal life with a new girlfriend, and is very friendly.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Leland has a full plate of fugitives in Kona, and the whole family heads to the Big Island to help.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog visits his mother's grave for inspiration before heading out to find Frankie, a violent fugitive hiding in the jungle. The spirit of Ma Chapman seems to help when Dog finds an unusual ally; Frankie's mother.

programme.desc: Elusive assassin Drizzle transforms herself into modest shop owner Zeng Jing (Michelle Yeoh) in order to transport the remains of an exalted Buddhist monk to their eternal resting place, but finds her mission unexpectedly complicated.

programme.title: Red Cliff

programme.title: Paradox
programme.desc: When his daughter goes missing, a police negotiator (Louis Koo) teams with local police (Tony Jaa) to find her, but instead finds himself embroiled in a web of corruption and violence in this explosive thriller from director Wilson Yip.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, more than a dozen children in Seattle, Washington, were fighting for their lives. Each one of them had contracted a serious unknown illness. After one died, investigators knew the clock was ticking.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Fire engulfs the home where Lori Keidel and her siblings were left alone while their father went to the laundromat. Years after her mother's disappearance, Lori tells police she witnessed her mother's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Young Navajos in the Southwest were dying at an alarming rate. The tribe's medicine men provided investigators with a critical clue that would lead halfway around the world to a most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Edward Post drew a bath for his wife before going for a run. He returned to find her not breathing. She died before emergency response arrived. Police considered her death accidental until a motive surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Women in a Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who leaves no clues to his identity. But technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool. Police narrow their search to one man: local policeman Randy Comeaux.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the wife of a well-known dentist is found dead, police struggle to identify a suspect. Some fibers and a study of the weather patterns on the night of the murder break the case open and reveal the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Joann Katrinak is found dead in a corn field with her infant son, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue which uncovers a twisted story of passion gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier. One of the few clues was an address book found along with the body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a policeman's house goes up in flames, experts suspect arson. The officer whose home was torched arrests low-level drug dealer James Wren, who confesses. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators question the authenticity of the confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nancy Newman and her two daughters are found brutally murdered. The crime scene has no shortage of evidence, but investigators cannot find a conclusive link to their prime suspect. To solve the puzzle, an FBI analyst designs a unique experiment.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police find the body of 11-year-old Krista Harrison, there are few clues to the killer's identity. But authorities are intrigued by unusual orange fibers embedded in clothing found near the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: This examination of the role autopsies play in murder investigations focuses on the suspicious death of Virginia Ridley. Police charge her mentally unstable husband with murder, but a medical examiner discovers that she died of natural causes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An investigation of a pediatrician, prompted by the mysterious death of one of her patients, leads to a Texas hospital where the pediatric mortality rate is higher than at any hospital in the country.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the decomposed body of a teenage girl is discovered, police have no clues to her identity. To solve the case, investigators turn to bug larvae found on the body and a tiny wad of chewing gum found near the victim's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police suspect Dr. John "Jack" Boyle in the disappearance of his wife, Noreen, when he signs mortgage papers for a new house with a woman pretending to be his spouse. The police later find Noreen's body in the basement of Dr. Boyle's new house.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Survivors of Nazi atrocities recognized Archbishop Trifa, former head of the Romanian Orthodox Church in America, as having directed a bloody attack against Jews during World War II. He was deported in 1984 and died three years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a popular gym teacher is found dead of what appears to be an accidental gunshot wound, his family is suspicious. A tape recorded by the victim just before his death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this international case of extortion, murder and stolen identities, scam-artist Albert J. Walker assumes the identity of co-worker Ronald Platt. Platt later turns up dead in an ocean with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When heart surgeon Darryl Sutorius is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home, police assume he committed suicide. Further investigation reveals that his new wife Della has a history of violence and an insatiable desire for money.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: 6-year-old Nicole Rae Walker was killed in a hit-and-run in her Ft. Lauderdale neighborhood. The prosecutor combines the talents of an accident reconstruction expert with a video specialist to create a graphic demonstration of the moment of impact.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When convenience store employee Wanda Mason is found dead, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's security camera. But the image of the killer is so degraded it seems impossible to positively identify him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police investigate a missing college girl and discover her double life: attending school by day and working as a call-girl by night. Her body is found and investigators find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is reported missing after a fight with her husband. Police suspect a man who reported a fire in his car. Two tiny drops of blood are found in the interior. Finally, a tiny clue inside the suspect's watchband helps solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, Maine resident Pearl Smith goes missing after an argument with her husband, Bill Bruns. When investigators find a blood trail that leads to the couple's basement, police are sure they'll find the victim's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1989, 4-year-old April Loveless was found dead in the backyard of her Texas home. Her parents told police that she was attacked and killed by wild dogs. Investigators did not agree.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, San Diego police are baffled by a pair of hands found in a dumpster. Through further investigation, they determine that the hands are those of missing person Don Hardin.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, a federal agency ruled that Terri Strickland had intentionally set the fire that killed her 17-month-old son, Josh Hinson. Using the then-emerging resources of the internet, Strickland undertook her own investigation.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky insults Lucy's taste in hats so, as a joke, Lucy puts a loving cap trophy on her head that Ricky plans to present to champion jockey Johnny Longden at a National Turf Association dinner later that night. The trophy gets stuck on Lucy's head.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Little Ricky is turning 5 years old and Lucy had a party planned for Saturday, but Caroline Appleby is throwing a birthday party for her son Stevie on the same day. Neither mother is willing to change the date of their party.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ricky are determined to get rid of the puppy their son has brought home. They have a hard time overcoming Little Ricky’s arguments that it’s a welcome addition to a home that already boasts a parakeet, a frog, a lizard, a turtle and a goldfish.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy has become tired of living in the city and drops some none-too-subtle hints to Ricky that it would be nice to move to the country. Unbeknownst to her Ricky has already placed a comfortable deposit on a house in Westport, Connecticutt.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos are anxious about their move to the country. Reality really sets in when Fred shows their apartment to a young couple. The Taylors will take the apartment but need to move in immediately.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos get settled in their country home after all those years in a New York apartment and immediately begin to miss their old friends, Fred and Ethel. Lucy and Ricky decide to surprise the Mertzes with a visit.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Wanting to replace their old furniture, Lucy gets an allowance of $500 from Ricky. Lucy goes overboard when she shops with their new neighbor Betty Ramsey, spending over three thousand dollars!

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Although there are perks to living in their new country home, like House & Garden wanting to do a spread on them, the Ricardos find that it is expensive in Connecticut. Lucy decides to raise chickens and sell eggs as a moneymaking sideline.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes, impatient with their egg selling business, decide that they must trade in their 500 chicks for 200 egg laying hens. However, after a couple of weeks, these hens don't yield many eggs at all.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides to take part in the fund-raising campaign of the Westport Historical Society and offers to get her husband and his band to perform for their kickoff function. There's only one hitch – Ricky refuses to do it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy dreams of a night in New York City after spending six whole weeks in their new Connecticut home and it turns into a nightmare. Carefully hoarded tickets to a Broadway musical are supposed to take the Ricardos and the Mertzes to see the sold-out show.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel is jealous of Lucy's friendship with neighbor Betty Ramsey. Sensitive to this, Lucy decides that the three of them should have a nice lunch together. Although reticent at first, Ethel opens up to Betty upon hearing they are both from Albuquerque.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy must get vacationing Ricky out of her hair so she can do her housework. She and Ethel trick their husbands into building a brick barbecue on the Ricardo patio by first pretending to build it themselves.

programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes go with their neighbors, Ralph and Betty Ramsey, to the country club dance where a pretty visitor quickly convinces the men they are Romeos in disguise. They are each taken with Diana, the young beautiful cousin of a neighbor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides Ricky's love is growing cold so she takes Ethel's advice she learned from a book, How to Keep the Honeymoon from Ending. Her attempt to dress up for breakfast doesn't yield any response from Ricky.
